name: Producer Split Workbench
description: Royalty and credit split workbench for producers with contributor roles, master/publishing percentages, validation totals, signing status, and payout readiness.

workbench.description: Full split editor with validation meters, role breakdowns, signing status, and payout readiness

summary.description: Compact split summary for inspectors and track detail pages

visual_brief: A label-ready royalty split surface. The top shows selected track, master split meter, publishing split meter, validation total, and release readiness. Contributor rows show avatar, role, master %, publishing %, songwriter credit, publisher, status, and signing action with table-like alignment. Invalid totals are visually obvious through text, icon, and color. Signed rows feel locked; pending rows show clear next actions. The workbench should feel operational, trustable, and audit-ready rather than decorative.

slots.split-meters: Master and publishing totals with 100% validation and over/under warnings.
slots.contributors: Editable contributor rows with role, credits, percentages, status, and signature state.
slots.readiness: Payout routing, contract status, and export readiness summary.

composition.ContributorSplitRow: Grid > [Avatar + RoleBreakdown + MasterPercent + PublishingPercent + SignatureStatus + Actions]

micro.percent-edit: meter value animates to new total in 180ms
micro.validation-change: banner pulses once on invalid/valid transition

responsive.mobile: Contributor rows become stacked forms with split meters pinned above the list.
responsive.desktop: Use a dense grid with meters and contributor rows visible together.

layout_hints.trust: Validation and signed/pending states must be impossible to miss.
layout_hints.density: Use table-like alignment on desktop but switch to readable stacked forms on mobile.
